note: Editorial metadata + SOURCE manifests for the per-organ pages. bin/render-docs.mjs merges this with the LIVE component lists + counts read from the organ repos, then emits docs/organs/*.html + docs/organs.html. Component LISTS come from source (can't drift); the descriptions here are best-effort (a new component still appears, name-only). roots resolve relative to the cambium repo's parent dir.

organs.name: genesis — mint the brand
organs.tagline: an idea becomes a full brand system across waves 1-8 — and it sets the setpoint x*

spend.label: 💲 gated
spend.reason: (paid image / inference generation in the waves)

organs.entrypoint: brandmint launch --waves 1-8   (CLI: brandmint.cli.app:main) · alias: skill-clusters taste/scripts/brandmint.mjs (runBrandKit)
organs.homeostasis: The FIRST contraction: genesis establishes x* (the brand-DNA fixed point everything else converges to) and writes the seed taste to the cortex. A non-contractive genesis — dropping the mission — is the classic drift (the 'Fitcheck reads as fitness' miss).

descriptions.design_memory: writes the brand's seed taste = x* (cortex client)

agent_contracts.consumption_note: Emit the three brand groups as structured top-level keys. Agents must forward them verbatim to taste/build; do not flatten to prose. Missing brand_system is contract drift at first contraction.

organs.agent_notes: First contraction toward x*. Seed the variable groups that make every downstream stage contractive. Use the prompt-reference-schema for any cortex writes. See docs/plans/assets/ for handoff matrix and retrieval schema.

organs.name: hands + conductor — build on-brand
organs.tagline: 40 hub-and-spoke clusters + a conductor that turns a spec-kit tasks.md into a dispatch plan, builds, and ships

spend.label: ○ free
spend.reason: (resolution is no-spend; the cluster-orchestrator dispatch is the gated extension)

organs.homeostasis: Executes the contraction the taste brief specifies; ship-battery is a fail-closed gate (no expansive/broken artifact ships).

organs.name: taste cortex — set the taste
organs.tagline: the aesthetic conscience (the paid right brain) — emits the on-brand brief, scores artifacts, rerolls until on-brand, learns the brand's taste

spend.label: 💲 gated (NIM)
spend.reason: (embeds the request via the paid NIM cortex — NVIDIA_API_KEY)

organs.homeostasis: THE CONTRACTION OPERATOR (Lᵢ<1): 'make it feel on-brand' IS re-projection toward x*. kit-qa is the Lyapunov V-check (refuse steps that don't lower V); reroll is the self-heal loop. The paid NIM is the moat.

descriptions.taste-resolve: the conductor — emits the on-brand brief

organs.name: will — operate + go to market
organs.tagline: a 7-agent C-suite + multi-tenant governance + GTM; the dispatcher routes work via skill-hooks (60 skills → 7 agents)

spend.label: 💲 gated (Explee)
spend.reason: (brand_to_gtm drives paid Explee via the explee-proxy — needs an approved Brief + EXPLEE_PROXY_TOKEN)

organs.entrypoint: the dispatcher (channel/agent-plane adapters) · scripts/lib/gtm.py brand_to_gtm (gated; a thin CLI wrapper is the follow-up)
organs.homeostasis: The will/OS keeps the business on-brand at the portfolio scale — a homeostat one level up; brand_to_gtm is approval-gated (constitution #4 — no unapproved spend off the convergence path).

organs.name: shared cortex — the aesthetic memory
organs.tagline: the 1024-dim NIM metric space (X, d) the whole engine converges in — cosine distance IS on-brand-ness; x* lives here
organs.entrypoint: CortexStore or makeCortex transport (embed / search) · provider dimensions are adapter-specific
organs.homeostasis: This IS (X, d) from HOMEOSTASIS.md — the substrate where V = d(x, x*) is computed; without it there is no measurable drift and no self-healing. The product contract is the provider-neutral memory seam; taste/design workers are optional adapters behind it.
